name: Comprehensive Environmental Inc. (CEI)
description: Provides FAA-certified drone survey and LIDAR services using small Unmanned Aerial Systems for environmental and engineering applications, including water storage tank inspections with real-time imagery.

name: Highpoint Engineering
description: Offers drone aerial services integrated with civil engineering, land planning, and permitting to save time, reduce costs, and enhance project decisions with industry expertise.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Communication is always good, and they are always on top of things.
They're very flexible and they have a 'Get It Done' attitude.
I can count on them to make sure we meet/exceed local, state and federal code expectations.
They have an understanding on how to approach complicated projects.

sentiment.summary: Highpoint Engineering is consistently praised by clients for exceptional communication, reliability, flexibility, and expertise in managing complex engineering projects with meticulous attention to compliance and code standards.

name: Sherwood Inspection Services
description: Provides drone inspection services in Connecticut and Massachusetts using high-quality drones with state-of-the-art cameras for detailed property inspections, capturing images and videos from hard-to-reach vantage points.
